title: zornia harmsii
intro: Zornia harmsii is a plant species in the legume family, native to Mexico and Central America, and is also known as Guajillo or Guajillo de la tierra. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Zornia harmsii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as a natural antihistamine. Herbal preparations of Zornia harmsii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
